== Notes for [[Item:Q83374|Q83374]] ==

* '''Paternal Aunt of Maimoona binte al-Haarith (wife of the Prophet), How?'''

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saffya_bint_abi_al-A%27as

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3142358571EFBC189822EF79916C05B5
geni:6000000003493135502

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
